10589400.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
10589400.description: A fraternal bond can be unbreakable, with secrets and codes based on favourite films and silly plans. What happens when a body is found and the codes are used for murder?

10590190.title: Judge Judy
10590190.description: A youngster sues her mother for not handing over an accident settlement.

10590291.title: Cheaters
10590291.description: The Cheaters detectives are on hand to help Christina, who has noticed a change in boyfriend Robert's behaviour, and Rebecca, whose partner of four years has become distant.

10591228.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10591228.description: Mother-and-son duo, Sante and Kenny Kimes, are convicted of two murders and suspected of a third, along with robbery, forgery, and other crimes.

10592180.title: Judge Judy
10592180.description: A pair who met on a dating website fight over an engagement ring and unpaid credit-card charges. Then, ex-lovers feud over custody of an expensive knife, a car and appliances.

10592269.title: Judge Judy
10592269.description: A woman says her ex-husband gave their daughter a lemon car. Then, former lovers dispute an assault, destroyed belongings and six years of unpaid rent and bills.

10593134.title: Judge Judy
10593134.description: A woman sues her former friend and tenant for damages to her home and the return of her belongings. Then, a man accuses his ex-tenant's children of vandalism, and she countersues, saying he assaulted her son.

10593177.title: Something's Killing Me
10593177.description: Mark Staudte abruptly became ill, experiencing seizures and his skin turning yellow. Within 48 hours, Mark died, and five months later, his son developed similar symptoms.

10594121.title: Operation Repo
10594121.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10594221.title: Operation Repo
10594221.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10594328.title: Judge Judy
10594328.description: The plaintiff accuses her ex-lover of buying himself a new motorcycle instead of repaying her for an investment. Then, a woman lends more than 100 DVDs to a 20-year-old she met in a bar.

10595173.title: Judge Judy
10595173.description: Dumping a bottle of bourbon incites a physical fight among family members.

10595280.title: Motorbike Cops
10595280.description: Join Britain's traffic cops on their daily jobs and get an inside look into what goes into policing the country's roads.

10596157.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10596157.description: The story of two close friends body boarding off an Australian beach: Irishman Shane must go to the aid of his pal when a great white shark attacks. Plus a motorist risks her own life to save a family when their car bursts into flames following a motorway smash. Also, a woman survives when part of a huge tree crashes onto her car in a storm.

10596250.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10596250.description: The Chapmans return to Hawaii after training bounty hunters across the US. Meanwhile, competitors have taken advantage of the Chapmans' absence and a convict may jump bail.

10597194.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10597194.description: A veteran saloon car race driver is involved in a horrific crash on the finish line, two friends fish a hand grenade out of a river, and a young boy alerts his mum to a car fire.

10597283.title: Operation Repo
10597283.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10598246.title: Paranormal Survivor
10598246.description: Chris Houston is haunted by an evil ghost boy. A farmhouse is cursed by the presence of dark entities. Something dangerously demonic lurks in Bonnie Shukofksy's home.

10599208.title: Judge Judy
10599208.description: A man claims his friend attacked him during a drunken exchange and cut him for no reason. His friend says the injury occurred accidentally during a fight.

10599315.title: Judge Judy
10599315.description: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a judge from New York, tackles real-life small claims cases with a no-nonsense attitude.

10600129.title: Judge Judy
10600129.description: Ex-lovers fight over custody of a dog, a missing vehicle and credit card.

10601298.title: Something's Killing Me
10601298.description: Seven Chicago residents died under mysterious medical circumstances. Diagnoses included cardiac arrest, stroke and aneurism. However, a connection is made to all seven victims.

10603196.title: Judge Judy
10603196.description: A woman sues for medical bills when a teen breaks her daughter's nose during a fight, but discovers there is more to the story.

10604028.title: Judge Judy
10604028.description: A man sues his designated driver for crashing his car, a woman sues a friend for the cost of a car he sold her and then repossessed.

10604146.title: Paranormal Survivor
10604146.description: Chris Houston is haunted by an evil ghost boy. A farmhouse is cursed by the presence of dark entities. Something dangerously demonic lurks in Bonnie Shukofksy's home.

10608967.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10608967.description: Examining the life and crimes of Stephen Seddon, who killed his parents for a legacy.

10609906.title: Cheaters
10609906.description: Brenda's husband claims to work long hours - but his co-workers say otherwise. Raquel finds a phone number on a napkin in her boyfriend's pocket.

10610889.title: Fame Kills
10610889.description: When a young actress from the Pacific Northwest moves to Los Angeles to become a star, her dreams turn to nightmares when evil knocks on her door.

10611710.title: Paranormal Survivor
10611710.description: A woman is horrified to discover restless souls buried in the cemetery next to her house; when a man digs up an old tombstone in his yard, he unwittingly unearths a violent entity.
